title: Roasted Polish Beetroot Roast
description: A hearty, vegan-friendly Polish dish featuring roasted beetroot and a variety of spring vegetables, perfect for a midnight craving. This dish is a great way to enjoy the flavors of Poland in a healthy and satisfying way.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the beetroot, carrots, parsnips, and potatoes with the olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables out in a single layer on a large baking sheet.
Roast the vegetables in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the baking sheet and continue to roast for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and sprinkle the chopped fresh dill over the top of the vegetables.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and roast for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and let the vegetables cool for a few minutes before serving.
